sections.paragraph:
Original: רכב

Transliteration: râkab

Phonetic: raw-kab'

BDB Definition:

  1. to mount and ride, ride
    1. (Qal)
      1. to mount, mount and sit or ride
      2. to ride, be riding
      3. rider (substantive)
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to cause to ride, cause to (mount and) ride
      2. to cause to draw (plough, etc)
      3. to cause to ride upon (figuratively)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2163

Part(s) of speech: Verb
